title: Tasty Hangover Cure Croatian Mushrooms Bouillon
description: A briny, snappy hangover cure featuring marjoram, dashi-extract, and ayurvedic rajasic-friendly Croatian mushrooms. This dish is a perfect way to revive after a night of imbibing.

ingredients.name: Croatian wild mushrooms (such as chanterelle, oyster, and shiitake)
Marjoram
ingredients.notes: a key herb in traditional Croatian medicine

instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and saut6; until fragrant.
Add the Croatian wild mushrooms and saut6; until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Add the dashi stock concentrate, marjoram, sea salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Pour in the water and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 15 minutes, or until the flavors have melded together and the mushrooms are tender.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Stir in the apple cider vinegar and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
